description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical hat with a flat top and a wide, flat brim, reminiscent of classic formal headwear. The main body of the hat is a soft pink color, and it features a distinct, smooth yellow band encircling the base of the crown. The brim is broad and circular, providing a strong visual contrast to the vertical sides of the crown. The surface appears matte and uniform, with no visible textures or patterns. There are no additional decorative elements such as feathers, bows, or logos. The overall design is simple, elegant, and suitable for formal or ceremonial occasions.
description: A tall, pink top hat with a flat crown, wide brim, and a yellow band at the base. The design is simple, smooth, and formal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, cylindrical pink crown and the yellow band above the wide, flat brim.
description_view_1: Side view with the same features visible, highlighting the uniformity of the crown and brim.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with the yellow band and flat brim clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the consistent cylindrical shape and yellow band.
